name: aura-clinic-piercing
description: Monorepo da Aura Clinic Piercing: backend (Node/Express + Postgres) e frontend (React/Vite) como projetos independentes.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
